attempted_steps_summary: Phase 0: Verified workspace git state — inside work-tree, branch main, origin https://github.com/ronaldarroyowatson/CourseForge.git, test remote https://github.com/ronaldarroyowatson/CourseForge-test.git. 5 files modified (uncommitted), 2 untracked. Repo structure is healthy.
Phase 0: Located active VS Code log session folder 20260426T120517 and confirmed paths for GitHub Copilot Chat.log, GitHub Authentication.log, and renderer.log.

Phase 1: Extracted auth state from current session — Copilot token confirmed present and valid (plus_yearly_subscriber_quota) at 12:05:38 and 12:05:41. Has token: true confirmed. Baseline OAuth scope functional; broad project/org scope returned 0 sessions (consistently across sessions).
Phase 1: Found 429 Too Many Requests in current session auth log at 12:05:29.438 (EDU details check at startup). Additional 429s found in prior 2026-04-25 session logs at 22:17:42 and 22:22:34.
Phase 1: No external-code-ingest or fileset lines found in current session (20260426T120517) Copilot Chat log — the blocked state is a carry-over from prior sessions.

Phase 1: Prior session log evidence (sourced from docs/COPILOT_CODEBASE_INDEX_DIAGNOSTICS.md, originally from session 20260425T221714) confirmed fileset_id vscode.copilot-chat.09d20171-d551-429b-bf54-087a6f9150be and two DELETE 404 failures at 22:21:59 and 22:24:05.

Phase 2: HALTED — 429 Too Many Requests observed at session startup (12:05:29.438). Per hard rules, no delete or build index commands were issued in this run. The 429 was on an auth/EDU check, not on ingest directly, but rules mandate immediate stop-and-record.

Phase 3: Confirmed index has never reached Ready state across any inspected session. Workspace embeddings service initialized (metis-1024-I16-Binary) but this reflects embedding type config, not that the remote workspace index is complete. Delete and Build commands are known-available from prior session invocations. No renderer.log lines for external-code-ingest or fileset found.
Phase 4: Classified as BlockedFileset404. Root cause is stale/orphaned fileset state server-side. Local repo, auth, and command availability are all healthy.
escalation_bundle.recommended_escalation_message: We are requesting a service-side inspection and manual reset of a stale Copilot external ingest fileset for the repository ronaldarroyowatson/CourseForge (local path: C:/Users/ronal/Documents/CourseForge, branch: main). Copilot codebase indexing has been persistently blocked: every attempt to delete the external ingest fileset returns HTTP 404 with the message 'fileset not found', yet the index never transitions to a Ready state either. The fileset identifier observed in logs is vscode.copilot-chat.09d20171-d551-429b-bf54-087a6f9150be. Two DELETE 404 failures were recorded on 2026-04-25 at 22:21:59 and 22:24:05 UTC, a third 429 Too Many Requests was observed at 22:17:42 and 22:22:34 UTC during the same session, and a 429 was again observed at session startup on 2026-04-26 at 12:05:29 UTC. The local repository is fully healthy: git reports it is inside a work-tree on branch main with a valid GitHub remote, and Copilot token authentication is confirmed active (sku: plus_yearly_subscriber_quota). A separate test repository (ronaldarroyowatson/CourseForge-test) was also tried without resolving the block, which rules out a simple repo-structure or local-configuration issue. The Delete External Ingest and Build Remote Workspace Index commands are present and executable in VS Code. We request that the Copilot service team inspect the server-side fileset lifecycle state for this workspace/fileset ID, clear any stale or orphaned ingest state, and re-enable the index pipeline so that a fresh Build Remote Workspace Index can succeed.
